subject: Mathematics
title: Euclid and the Elements
description: Learn Euclid and the Elements in one minute.

hook.text: One book dominated mathematics for over 2,000 years—longer than any textbook in history.

buildup.text: Euclid's Elements organized all known geometry into 13 books of definitions, axioms, and proofs.

discovery.text: It starts with five simple postulates and builds the entire universe of plane geometry from them.

twist.text: Almost nothing is known about Euclid himself. Even his birthplace is debated.

climax.text: Abraham Lincoln taught himself logic by studying the Elements. It has shaped countless minds.

punchline.text: The most influential math book ever was written by a ghost.

quiz.question: How many books make up Euclid's Elements?
